w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Dedicated full stack mobile app developer with tech stack of Flutter , React Native, Node JS , MySQL with over 7+ years of proven expertise in designing and implementing innovative and high-performance mobile applications with complete backend solution as well. Proficient in Agile methodology, I excel in leading and mentoring development teams to deliver outstanding results. My portfolio features a wide range of successful projects, demonstrating my adaptability and commitment to staying at the forefront of frontend and backend technologies.
Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering, Bahria University, Karachi
Masters in Project Management, Bahria University, Karachi

As a dedicated Backend developer at Z2C limited, I oversee a product’s backend name as “Begin”. This product is similar to Netflix and I am responsible for the backend tech and functionalities behind it.
Team Lead Mobile Development, NOORUSOFT, Karachi

As a dedicated Team Lead at NOORUSOFT, I oversee a portfolio of one critical mobile application: Shaadi organization and some projects as well. My multifaceted role encompasses diverse responsibilities, demonstrating my commitment to delivering exceptional results and driving innovation
Lead and manage a dynamic team of developers, providing clear task assignments, guidance, and support to ensure project success.
Identify training needs within the team and provide opportunities for skill development and growth.
Cultivate positive client relationships, understanding their needs and ensuring their satisfaction with the delivered products and services.
Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend and backend trends, technologies, and best practices to ensure the application's competitiveness.

As a dedicated Mobile developer at Shipox, I oversee a portfolio of two critical mobile applications: Shipox Driver and Shipox Customer. My multifaceted role encompasses diverse responsibilities, demonstrating my commitment to delivering exceptional results and driving innovation.
Analyze new feature requests, conceptualize their integration, and formulate comprehensive roadmaps to drive application enhancements.
Actively engage in hands-on development and daily customer ticket support, ensuring seamless operation and swift issue resolution.
Skillfully manage the white-labeling process, creating distinct product flavors tailored to specific client requirements.
Conduct rigorous code reviews, offering constructive feedback, and facilitating the implementation of best architectural practices to maintain code quality and scalability.
Pioneered the implementation of real-time driver tracking, enhancing customer visibility into shipments.
Ensured timely updates on order statuses, promoting transparency and efficiency in operations.
Developed and integrated batch update functionalities to streamline data processing.
Spearheaded the integration of real-time signature capture functionality for both recipients and senders, enhancing the accountability and verification process for deliveries.

Seamlessly integrated real-time online payment options, catering to diverse client preferences. Supported payment gateways include Stripe and customized MPOS connectivity, enabling secure and efficient transactions directly within the mobile app, particularly valuable for Cash-on-Delivery (COD) scenarios.
Sr. Full Stack Developer, MangoTech Solutions, Karachi

As a Senior Full Stack Developer at MangoTech Solutions, I played a pivotal role in driving innovation and delivering high-impact complete mobile app solutions including frontend and backend. Over my tenure, I successfully executed a range of projects, contributing to the company's growth and reputation for excellence in the mobile development industry.
at MangoTech Solutions has enhanced my expertise and broadened my horizons in mobile development, making me a valuable asset in the everevolving landscape of mobile technology.

In the Axsonstech, I've reached new heights as a pivotal figure in a groundbreaking startup, elevating my skills in handling frontend (Flutter -React Native) and back-end development using Node JS and MySQL.
Freelance Full Stack Mobile Developer, Soiree
Designed and developed "Soiree" a revolutionary mobile application that connects users with all the events and parties based out at UK.
Created the backend API using .NET Core, ensuring robust and secure data management.
Introduced booking system so that user can book for the event and see all of his bookings.
Designed and integrated Event creation features, empowering users to efficiently see all the trusted events.
Played a pivotal role in the successful launch of the Android and iOS app.
Designed and developed "Dokita cameroon" a revolutionary mobile application that connects doctors to their patients.
Introduced prescription system so that user can get prescription from the doctor on their app.
Designed and integrated appointments calendar so that doctor can easily see the appointments count for every day.
Played a pivotal role in the successful launch of the Android app.
Freelance Full Stack Mobile Developer, Lets Get Organized!©
Designed and developed "Let's Get Organized!©," a revolutionary mobile application that connects users with Professional Organizers worldwide.
Created the backend API using .NET Core, ensuring robust and secure data management.
Implemented real-time chat functionality using Node.js and MongoDB, enhancing user engagement and convenience.
Introduced in-app purchases for premium users, contributing to revenue generation and user retention.
Designed and integrated checklist creation features, empowering users to efficiently organize their lives.
Played a pivotal role in the successful launch of the Android app.
An online platform providing legal forms
-compliant wills and inheritance rules, featuring a scholar-certified Islamic Inheritance Calculator.
Conceptualized and developed the "Shariawiz" mobile application.
Utilized Cross platform to create a robust cross-platform solution.
Guided the application through the entire development cycle, including design, coding, testing, and debugging.
Successfully published the "Shariawiz" application on leading app stores.
Implemented Islamic legal principles to enable users to plan their estates in accordance with their faith.
Developed "First Medicine," a telehealth application providing convenient access to certified doctors and specialists via smartphone.
Enabled users to schedule appointments, engage in real-time video consultations, and receive AI-generated prescriptions based on customer responses.
Implemented features such as real-time chatting, live video calls with consultants, and consultant discovery.
Contributed to the successful launch of "First Medicine" on both Android and iOS platforms.
Spearheaded the development of Certkingdom.com's Testing Engine for both mobile and desktop platforms.
Implemented key features such as Real Test simulations, Practice tests with countdown timers, and manual configuration options for test settings, including the ability to show/hide answers.
Developed a robust system for securely handling encrypted test files provided by the organization, which are decrypted on runtime. Ensured end-to-end encryption for these files.

Contributed to enhancing the learning experience for users by providing access to Q & A, Study Guides, Preparation Labs, Case Studies, Audio Exams preparation, and Video Tutorials for over 4500+ exams, thereby facilitating career advancement.
Let's Get Organized – Meet Professional Organizer https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.axsosntech.organizeme
My Diary – Manage Your Routine Tasks https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.axsonstech.mydiary
Falahi - connects needy and donor meets https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.falahi
